import os
from openpyxl import load_workbook
path='desktop/fashion_ecommerce/product_data/top10_product_status_table.xlsx'
wb=load_workbook(path,data_only=True)

PY"

/chanpin/data_review_and_feedback/scripts/metrics_dashboard.py:#!/usr/bin/env python3
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""
Core product metrics dashboard script
Purpose: aggregate and display core product metrics across dimensions
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass
from datetime import date, datetime, timedelta
from typing import Dict, List, Optional, Tuple


@dataclass
class MetricValue:
    """Metric value"""
    value: float
    unit: str
    prev_value: Optional[float] = None  # Previous period value (WoW)
    yoy_value: Optional[float] = None   # Same period last year (YoY)
    
    @property
    def wow_change(self) -> Optional[float]:
        """Week-over-week change"""
        if self.prev_value and self.prev_value != 0:
            return (self.value - self.prev_value) / self.prev_value
        return None
    
    @property
    def yoy_change(self) -> Optional[float]:
        """Year-over-year change"""
        if self.yoy_value and self.yoy_value != 0:
            return (self.value - self.yoy_value) / self.yoy_value
        return None
    
    def format_change(self, change: Optional[float]) -> str:
        if change is None:
            return "N/A"
        arrow = "↑" if change > 0 else "↓"
        return f"{arrow} {abs(change):.1%}"


class ProductMetricsDashboard:
    """Product metrics dashboard"""
    
    def __init__(self, report_date: date, product_name: str = "TechFlow"):
        self.report_date = report_date
        self.product_name = product_name
        self.metrics: Dict[str, MetricValue] = {}
    
    def add_metric(self, key: str, metric: MetricValue):
        self.metrics[key] = metric
    
    def generate_report(self, title: str = "Weekly Product Metrics Report") -> str:
        week_start = self.report_date - timedelta(days=self.report_date.weekday())
        week_end = week_start + timedelta(days=6)
        
        lines = [
            f"📊 {self.product_name} - {title}",
            f"Reporting period: {week_start} to {week_end}",
            f"Generated at: {datetime.now():%Y-%m-%d %H:%M}",
            "=" * 55,
        ]
        
        # User Scale
        lines.extend(self._format_section("👥 User Scale", [
            ("DAU", "Daily Active Users"),
            ("MAU", "Monthly Active Users"),
            ("new_users", "New Registered Users"),
            ("paid_users", "Paying Users"),
        ]))
        
        # Retention Quality
        lines.extend(self._format_section("🔄 Retention Quality", [
            ("day1_retention", "Day-1 Retention"),
            ("day7_retention", "Day-7 Retention"),
            ("day30_retention", "Day-30 Retention"),
        ]))
        
        # Monetization
        lines.extend(self._format_section("💰 Monetization", [
            ("gmv", "GMV"),
            ("revenue", "Platform Revenue"),
            ("arpu", "ARPU"),
            ("conversion_rate", "Payment Conversion Rate"),
        ]))
        
        # Product performance
        lines.extend(self._format_section("📱 Product Performance", [
            ("session_duration", "Average Session Duration"),
            ("sessions_per_user", "Sessions per User"),
            ("feature_penetration", "Core Feature Penetration"),
        ]))
        
        return "
".join(lines)
    
    def _format_section(self, title: str, metric_keys: List[Tuple[str, str]]) -> List[str]:
        lines = [f"
{title}"]
        
        for key, label in metric_keys:
            if key in self.metrics:
                m = self.metrics[key]
                
                # Format value
                if m.unit == "%":
                    val_str = f"{m.value:.1f}%"
                elif m.unit == "10k":
                    val_str = f"{m.value:.1f} ten-thousand"
                elif m.unit == "CNY":
                    val_str = f"¥{m.value:,.0f}"
                elif m.unit == "min":
                    val_str = f"{m.value:.1f}min"
                else:
                    val_str = f"{m.value:,.0f}{m.unit}"
                
                wow = m.format_change(m.wow_change)
                
                lines.append(f"  {label:<14} {val_str:<16} WoW: {wow}")
        
        return lines


if __name__ == '__main__':
    dashboard = ProductMetricsDashboard(date.today())
    
    # Set this week's metric data
    metrics_data = {
        "DAU": MetricValue(152000, " users", 145000),
        "MAU": MetricValue(1850000, " users", 1780000),
        "new_users": MetricValue(8200, " users", 7600),
        "paid_users": MetricValue(62000, " users", 59500),
        "day1_retention": MetricValue(41.5, "%", 40.2),
        "day7_retention": MetricValue(27.8, "%", 26.9),
        "day30_retention": MetricValue(18.2, "%", 17.6),
        "gmv": MetricValue(1280000, "CNY", 1150000),
        "revenue": MetricValue(380000, "CNY", 345000),
        "arpu": MetricValue(8.4, "CNY", 7.9),
        "conversion_rate": MetricValue(3.8, "%", 3.5),
        "session_duration": MetricValue(12.3, "min", 11.8),
        "sessions_per_user": MetricValue(2.4, " visits", 2.3),
        "feature_penetration": MetricValue(68.5, "%", 66.2),
    }
    
    for key, metric in metrics_data.items():
        dashboard.add_metric(key, metric)
    
    report = dashboard.generate_report()
    print(report)

/chanpin/data_review_and_feedback/scripts/metrics_dashboard.py:#!/usr/bin/env python3\n# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-\n"""\nCore product metrics dashboard script\nPurpose: aggregate and display core product metrics across dimensions\n"""\n\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\nfrom datetime import date, datetime, timedelta\nfrom typing import Dict, List, Optional, Tuple\n\n\n@dataclass\nclass MetricValue:\n    """Metric value"""\n    value: float\n    unit: str\n    prev_value: Optional[float] = None  # Previous period value (WoW)\n    yoy_value: Optional[float] = None   # Same period last year (YoY)\n    \n    @property\n    def wow_change(self) -> Optional[float]:\n        """Week-over-week change"""\n        if self.prev_value and self.prev_value != 0:\n            return (self.value - self.prev_value) / self.prev_value\n        return None\n    \n    @property\n    def yoy_change(self) -> Optional[float]:\n        """Year-over-year change"""\n        if self.yoy_value and self.yoy_value != 0:\n            return (self.value - self.yoy_value) / self.yoy_value\n        return None\n    \n    def format_change(self, change: Optional[float]) -> str:\n        if change is None:\n            return "N/A"\n        arrow = "↑" if change > 0 else "↓"\n        return f"{arrow} {abs(change):.1%}"\n\n\nclass ProductMetricsDashboard:\n    """Product metrics dashboard"""\n    \n    def __init__(self, report_date: date, product_name: str = "TechFlow"):\n        self.report_date = report_date\n        self.product_name = product_name\n        self.metrics: Dict[str, MetricValue] = {}\n    \n    def add_metric(self, key: str, metric: MetricValue):\n        self.metrics[key] = metric\n    \n    def generate_report(self, title: str = "Weekly Product Metrics Report") -> str:\n        week_start = self.report_date - timedelta(days=self.report_date.weekday())\n        week_end = week_start + timedelta(days=6)\n        \n        lines = [\n            f"📊 {self.product_name} - {title}",\n            f"Reporting period: {week_start} to {week_end}",\n            f"Generated at: {datetime.now():%Y-%m-%d %H:%M}",\n            "=" * 55,\n        ]\n        \n        # User Scale\n        lines.extend(self._format_section("👥 User Scale", [\n            ("DAU", "Daily Active Users"),\n            ("MAU", "Monthly Active Users"),\n            ("new_users", "New Registered Users"),\n            ("paid_users", "Paying Users"),\n        ]))\n        \n        # Retention Quality\n        lines.extend(self._format_section("🔄 Retention Quality", [\n            ("day1_retention", "Day-1 Retention"),\n            ("day7_retention", "Day-7 Retention"),\n            ("day30_retention", "Day-30 Retention"),\n        ]))\n        \n        # Monetization\n        lines.extend(self._format_section("💰 Monetization", [\n            ("gmv", "GMV"),\n            ("revenue", "Platform Revenue"),\n            ("arpu", "ARPU"),\n            ("conversion_rate", "Payment Conversion Rate"),\n        ]))\n        \n        # Product performance\n        lines.extend(self._format_section("📱 Product Performance", [\n            ("session_duration", "Average Session Duration"),\n            ("sessions_per_user", "Sessions per User"),\n            ("feature_penetration", "Core Feature Penetration"),\n        ]))\n        \n        return "\n".join(lines)\n    \n    def _format_section(self, title: str, metric_keys: List[Tuple[str, str]]) -> List[str]:\n        lines = [f"\n{title}"]\n        \n        for key, label in metric_keys:\n            if key in self.metrics:\n                m = self.metrics[key]\n                \n                # Format value\n                if m.unit == "%":\n                    val_str = f"{m.value:.1f}%"\n                elif m.unit == "10k":\n                    val_str = f"{m.value:.1f} ten-thousand"\n                elif m.unit == "CNY":\n                    val_str = f"¥{m.value:,.0f}"\n                elif m.unit == "min":\n                    val_str = f"{m.value:.1f}min"\n                else:\n                    val_str = f"{m.value:,.0f}{m.unit}"\n                \n                wow = m.format_change(m.wow_change)\n                \n                lines.append(f"  {label:<14} {val_str:<16} WoW: {wow}")\n        \n        return lines\n\n\nif __name__ == '__main__':\n    dashboard = ProductMetricsDashboard(date.today())\n    \n    # Set this week's metric data\n    metrics_data = {\n        "DAU": MetricValue(152000, " users", 145000),\n        "MAU": MetricValue(1850000, " users", 1780000),\n        "new_users": MetricValue(8200, " users", 7600),\n        "paid_users": MetricValue(62000, " users", 59500),\n        "day1_retention": MetricValue(41.5, "%", 40.2),\n        "day7_retention": MetricValue(27.8, "%", 26.9),\n        "day30_retention": MetricValue(18.2, "%", 17.6),\n        "gmv": MetricValue(1280000, "CNY", 1150000),\n        "revenue": MetricValue(380000, "CNY", 345000),\n        "arpu": MetricValue(8.4, "CNY", 7.9),\n        "conversion_rate": MetricValue(3.8, "%", 3.5),\n        "session_duration": MetricValue(12.3, "min", 11.8),\n        "sessions_per_user": MetricValue(2.4, " visits", 2.3),\n        "feature_penetration": MetricValue(68.5, "%", 66.2),\n    }\n    \n    for key, metric in metrics_data.items():\n        dashboard.add_metric(key, metric)\n    \n    report = dashboard.generate_report()\n    print(report)

/chanpin/data_review_and_feedback/scripts/metrics_dashboard.py:#!/usr/bin/env python3
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""
Core product metrics dashboard script
Purpose: aggregate and display core product metrics across dimensions
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass
from datetime import date, datetime, timedelta
from typing import Dict, List, Optional, Tuple


@dataclass
class MetricValue:
    """Metric value"""
    value: float
    unit: str
    prev_value: Optional[float] = None  # Previous period value (WoW)
    yoy_value: Optional[float] = None   # Same period last year (YoY)
    
    @property
    def wow_change(self) -> Optional[float]:
        """Week-over-week change"""
        if self.prev_value and self.prev_value != 0:
            return (self.value - self.prev_value) / self.prev_value
        return None
    
    @property
    def yoy_change(self) -> Optional[float]:
        """Year-over-year change"""
        if self.yoy_value and self.yoy_value != 0:
            return (self.value - self.yoy_value) / self.yoy_value
        return None
    
    def format_change(self, change: Optional[float]) -> str:
        if change is None:
            return "N/A"
        arrow = "↑" if change > 0 else "↓"
        return f"{arrow} {abs(change):.1%}"


class ProductMetricsDashboard:
    """Product metrics dashboard"""
    
    def __init__(self, report_date: date, product_name: str = "TechFlow"):
        self.report_date = report_date
        self.product_name = product_name
        self.metrics: Dict[str, MetricValue] = {}
    
    def add_metric(self, key: str, metric: MetricValue):
        self.metrics[key] = metric
    
    def generate_report(self, title: str = "Weekly Product Metrics Report") -> str:
        week_start = self.report_date - timedelta(days=self.report_date.weekday())
        week_end = week_start + timedelta(days=6)
        
        lines = [
            f"📊 {self.product_name} - {title}",
            f"Reporting period: {week_start} to {week_end}",
            f"Generated at: {datetime.now():%Y-%m-%d %H:%M}",
            "=" * 55,
        ]
        
        # User Scale
        lines.extend(self._format_section("👥 User Scale", [
            ("DAU", "Daily Active Users"),
            ("MAU", "Monthly Active Users"),
            ("new_users", "New Registered Users"),
            ("paid_users", "Paying Users"),
        ]))
        
        # Retention Quality
        lines.extend(self._format_section("🔄 Retention Quality", [
            ("day1_retention", "Day-1 Retention"),
            ("day7_retention", "Day-7 Retention"),
            ("day30_retention", "Day-30 Retention"),
        ]))
        
        # Monetization
        lines.extend(self._format_section("💰 Monetization", [
            ("gmv", "GMV"),
            ("revenue", "Platform Revenue"),
            ("arpu", "ARPU"),
            ("conversion_rate", "Payment Conversion Rate"),
        ]))
        
        # Product performance
        lines.extend(self._format_section("📱 Product Performance", [
            ("session_duration", "Average Session Duration"),
            ("sessions_per_user", "Sessions per User"),
            ("feature_penetration", "Core Feature Penetration"),
        ]))
        
        return "
".join(lines)
    
    def _format_section(self, title: str, metric_keys: List[Tuple[str, str]]) -> List[str]:
        lines = [f"
{title}"]
        
        for key, label in metric_keys:
            if key in self.metrics:
                m = self.metrics[key]
                
                # Format value
                if m.unit == "%":
                    val_str = f"{m.value:.1f}%"
                elif m.unit == "10k":
                    val_str = f"{m.value:.1f} ten-thousand"
                elif m.unit == "CNY":
                    val_str = f"¥{m.value:,.0f}"
                elif m.unit == "min":
                    val_str = f"{m.value:.1f}min"
                else:
                    val_str = f"{m.value:,.0f}{m.unit}"
                
                wow = m.format_change(m.wow_change)
                
                lines.append(f"  {label:<14} {val_str:<16} WoW: {wow}")
        
        return lines


if __name__ == '__main__':
    dashboard = ProductMetricsDashboard(date.today())
    
    # Set this week's metric data
    metrics_data = {
        "DAU": MetricValue(152000, " users", 145000),
        "MAU": MetricValue(1850000, " users", 1780000),
        "new_users": MetricValue(8200, " users", 7600),
        "paid_users": MetricValue(62000, " users", 59500),
        "day1_retention": MetricValue(41.5, "%", 40.2),
        "day7_retention": MetricValue(27.8, "%", 26.9),
        "day30_retention": MetricValue(18.2, "%", 17.6),
        "gmv": MetricValue(1280000, "CNY", 1150000),
        "revenue": MetricValue(380000, "CNY", 345000),
        "arpu": MetricValue(8.4, "CNY", 7.9),
        "conversion_rate": MetricValue(3.8, "%", 3.5),
        "session_duration": MetricValue(12.3, "min", 11.8),
        "sessions_per_user": MetricValue(2.4, " visits", 2.3),
        "feature_penetration": MetricValue(68.5, "%", 66.2),
    }
    
    for key, metric in metrics_data.items():
        dashboard.add_metric(key, metric)
    
    report = dashboard.generate_report()
    print(report)
